name: DeepSeek AI
description: Blockly library for the official DeepSeek API, supporting chat, multi-turn chat, streaming, thinking mode and JSON output.

deepseek_ai_config.message0: configure DeepSeek API Key %1 Base URL %2
deepseek_ai_config.tooltip: Configure the DeepSeek API Key and endpoint address. The default Base URL is https://api.deepseek.com.

deepseek_ai_set_system_prompt.tooltip: Set the system message used by subsequent DeepSeek requests.

deepseek_ai_chat.tooltip: Send a single-turn text chat request and return the model reply.

deepseek_ai_thinking_chat.message0: DeepSeek thinking chat message %1 model %2 reasoning effort %3
deepseek_ai_thinking_chat.tooltip: Enable DeepSeek thinking mode and return the final answer. Use the last reasoning content block to read reasoning_content.

deepseek_ai_history_chat.tooltip: Send a chat request with conversation history and automatically record this user message and model reply.

deepseek_ai_json_chat.tooltip: Enable response_format=json_object. The prompt must state that the output should be JSON.

deepseek_ai_stream_chat.tooltip: Request the model in streaming mode. Each received text chunk triggers the configured streaming callback.

deepseek_ai_set_stream_callback.tooltip: Set the blocks to run when a DeepSeek streaming chunk arrives. Read the current chunk inside the callback.

deepseek_ai_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: Get the most recent text chunk received from a DeepSeek streaming request.

deepseek_ai_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: Clear the configured DeepSeek streaming callback.

deepseek_ai_clear_history.tooltip: Clear the locally saved multi-turn chat history.

deepseek_ai_get_response_status.tooltip: Return whether the previous DeepSeek request succeeded.

deepseek_ai_get_error_message.tooltip: Get the error message recorded when the previous DeepSeek request failed.

deepseek_ai_get_reasoning.tooltip: Get the reasoning_content returned by thinking mode.
